'''鈭歵-d-v''' ('''katadav''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:calcitrate|calcitrate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-d-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:calcitrate|calcitrate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵-d-v
|-
! Lemma
| katadav
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitadav|thitadav]] || [[word:jitadav|jitadav]] || [[word:shitadav|shitadav]] || [[word:kitadav|kitadav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutadav|thuthutadav]] || [[word:jujutadav|jujutadav]] || [[word:shushutadav|shushutadav]] || [[word:kukutadav|kukutadav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutadav|thutadav]] || [[word:jutadav|jutadav]] || [[word:shutadav|shutadav]] || [[word:kutadav|kutadav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thutadav|thutadav]] || [[word:jutadav|jutadav]] || [[word:shutadav|shutadav]] || [[word:kutadav|kutadav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thetadav|thetadav]] || [[word:jetadav|jetadav]] || [[word:shetadav|shetadav]] || [[word:ketadav|ketadav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothotadav|thothotadav]] || [[word:jojotadav|jojotadav]] || [[word:shoshotadav|shoshotadav]] || [[word:kokotadav|kokotadav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotadav|thotadav]] || [[word:jotadav|jotadav]] || [[word:shotadav|shotadav]] || [[word:kotadav|kotadav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotadav|thotadav]] || [[word:jotadav|jotadav]] || [[word:shotadav|shotadav]] || [[word:kotadav|kotadav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙tadav|th忙tadav]] || [[word:j忙tadav|j忙tadav]] || [[word:sh忙tadav|sh忙tadav]] || [[word:k忙tadav|k忙tadav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathatadav|thathatadav]] || [[word:jajatadav|jajatadav]] || [[word:shashatadav|shashatadav]] || [[word:kakatadav|kakatadav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatadav|thatadav]] || [[word:jatadav|jatadav]] || [[word:shatadav|shatadav]] || [[word:katadav|katadav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatadav|thatadav]] || [[word:jatadav|jatadav]] || [[word:shatadav|shatadav]] || [[word:katadav|katadav]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shatadav|shatadav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshatadav|goshatadav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishatadav|gokishatadav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shatadavn眉|shatadavn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshatadavnkn眉|goshatadavnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishatadavn眉|gokishatadavn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shatadavsh毛|shatadavsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshatadavnksh毛|goshatadavnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishatadavsh毛|gokishatadavsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatadavro|shatadavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatadavnkro|goshatadavnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatadavro|gokishatadavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shatadavmu|shatadavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatadavnkmu|goshatadavnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatadavmu|gokishatadavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shatadavsher|shatadavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshatadavnksher|goshatadavnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishatadavsher|gokishatadavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shatadavng|shatadavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshatadavnkng|goshatadavnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishatadavng|gokishatadavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shatadavya|shatadavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshatadavnkya|goshatadavnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishatadavya|gokishatadavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shatadavyam|shatadavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshatadavnkyam|goshatadavnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishatadavyam|gokishatadavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatadavn眉sh毛|shatadavn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatadavnkn眉sh毛|goshatadavnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatadavn眉sh毛|gokishatadavn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatadavn眉ro|shatadavn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatadavnkn眉ro|goshatadavnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatadavn眉ro|gokishatadavn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatadavn眉mu|shatadavn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatadavnkn眉mu|goshatadavnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatadavn眉mu|gokishatadavn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatadavsh毛n眉|shatadavsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatadavnksh毛n眉|goshatadavnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatadavsh毛n眉|gokishatadavsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatadavsh毛ro|shatadavsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatadavnksh毛ro|goshatadavnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatadavsh毛ro|gokishatadavsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatadavsh毛mu|shatadavsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatadavnksh毛mu|goshatadavnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatadavsh毛mu|gokishatadavsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatadavron眉|shatadavron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatadavnkron眉|goshatadavnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatadavron眉|gokishatadavron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatadavrosh毛|shatadavrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatadavnkrosh毛|goshatadavnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatadavrosh毛|gokishatadavrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatadavromu|shatadavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatadavnkromu|goshatadavnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatadavromu|gokishatadavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatadavmun眉|shatadavmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatadavnkmun眉|goshatadavnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatadavmun眉|gokishatadavmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatadavmush毛|shatadavmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatadavnkmush毛|goshatadavnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatadavmush毛|gokishatadavmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatadavmuro|shatadavmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatadavnkmuro|goshatadavnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatadavmuro|gokishatadavmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
